{{CargoRelic
|name=Dream Top
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=05-24
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Time Chest (1.5%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
|description=On May 24, 2005, this top was used to tell reality and dreams apart, and it has begun spinning.

After many years of research, the dream maker discovered that if the top keeps spinning, it means that someone is still in the dream. If it falls, it means that it is back in reality. He spins the top once to help his clients enter the dream and spins it again to bring them back to reality.

[Size]

Small: about 4 to 5 cm in diameter<br>Medium: weighs about 15 to 30 kg<br>Large: weighs more than 31 kg<br>Giant: 70 kg and above
|fame=51
|art=46
|fth=35
|civ=75
|tech=36
|ss1=Demon Gene Research SPD +1.8%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +4
|ss2=Demon Gene Research SPD +2.4%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +8
|ss3=Demon Gene Research SPD +3%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +12
|ss4=Demon Gene Research SPD +4.2%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +20
|ss5=Demon Gene Research SPD +5.4%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +28
|ss7=Demon Gene Research SPD +5.4%<br>Per 30 Demon Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +28<br>Demon Gene Research SPD +4.2% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Fungusfarm skill II.png|50px]] Place in Fungus Farm: Fungus Output +15%
|skill2=[[File:Fungusfarm skill II.png|50px]] Place in Fungus Farm: Grow Wonder Fungus by +15%
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:CIV Relics]]
[[Category:Purple CIV Relics]]
[[Category:Demon Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Demon Minion RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Skill]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Output Boost]]
[[Category:Wonder Fungus Output]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by DNA Strength]]
